overwhelming force should be applied methodically, documented thoroughly,
and reviewed post-engagement by a qualified panel. Six weapon mounts
deliver balanced firepower, four defense slots provide layered protection,
and the massive CPU array ensures that every tactical decision is
supported by real-time analysis. The design process took seven years.
The Confederacy considers this a feature.

outerrim_free_radical.name: Free Radical
outerrim_free_radical.description: Outer Rim fast battlecruiser. Hits like a capital ship, runs like a racer.
outerrim_free_radical.lore:
Speed 3 on a battlecruiser. Other empires' admirals consider this
reckless. Rim admirals consider it tactical. The Free Radical trades
raw durability for the ability to choose every engagement — strike where
the enemy is weakest, withdraw before they can concentrate force. Named
for the chemistry concept of an unstable, highly reactive element that
disrupts everything it touches. Rim pilots consider this aspirational.

crimson_munitions_foundry.name: Munitions Foundry
crimson_munitions_foundry.description: Crimson mobile weapons factory. Converts raw ore directly into ammunition and weapon components.
crimson_munitions_foundry.lore:
The Munitions Foundry-class is the Crimson Fleet's military-industrial
complex condensed into a single hull. Feed it raw ore, and the internal
smelters, forges, and assembly lines produce ammunition, weapon
components, and replacement parts without ever docking at a station.
The Fleet designed it to sustain prolonged campaigns in enemy territory
where supply lines are contested. Two weapon mounts protect the
investment — losing a Munitions Foundry sets fleet operations back
weeks. The foundry systems run hot enough to require dedicated cooling
infrastructure, which explains the tonnage that doesn't go to cargo.

crimson_portcullis.name: Portcullis
crimson_portcullis.description: Capital-grade Crimson interdictor. Traps entire fleets in normal space. Nobody runs.
crimson_portcullis.lore:
The Bastille stops frigates from running. The Portcullis stops
fleets. Capital-grade warp disruption generators create a field
large enough to prevent every ship in a system from engaging jump
drives. The Portcullis is the highest-priority target in any
engagement — and the Crimson Fleet builds it knowing that. Four
defense slots and the thickest shields on any Crimson support
vessel keep it functional while absorbing the concentrated fire
of enemies desperate to escape. Crimson doctrine never deploys a
Portcullis without enough firepower to hold the cage closed.
Enemies trapped by a Portcullis have two options: surrender or
demonstrate why the Crimson Fleet brought a Devastator too.

nebula_smelter.name: Smelter
nebula_smelter.description: Nebula mobile refinery. Converts raw ore to finished materials in the field.
nebula_smelter.lore:
The Smelter-class eliminates the most expensive part of the mining
supply chain: hauling raw ore back to a station for processing. Onboard
smelting furnaces, chemical separators, and automated quality assurance
systems convert raw materials into market-ready commodities in the
field. The Federation calculates that a Smelter increases mining fleet
profitability by 60% by cutting transport costs and time-to-market.

solarian_observatorium.name: Observatorium
solarian_observatorium.description: Solarian research cruiser. Capital-grade sensor arrays for phenomena other ships cannot detect.
solarian_observatorium.lore:
The Observatorium-class is the Confederacy's answer to the fundamental
question of astrophysics: "What are we not seeing?" Seven utility slots
support the most comprehensive sensor architecture ever mounted on a
mobile platform. The processing array — the most powerful on any T4 hull
— runs predictive models, spectral analysis, and gravitational mapping
simultaneously. Solarian research councils compete fiercely for
Observatorium deployment schedules, as a single expedition typically
generates enough data for dozens of doctoral theses. The vessel's
official designation is "Mobile Research Platform Alpha." Everyone calls
it by its class name because it sounds more impressive, and the
Confederacy has never officially objected.

voidborn_event_horizon.name: Event Horizon
voidborn_event_horizon.description: Voidborn battlecruiser. The boundary beyond which nothing escapes.
voidborn_event_horizon.lore:
The Event Horizon earns its name. Its shield array creates a zone of
absolute energy absorption around the hull — weapons fire enters but
does not exit as reflected energy. Other empires' tactical analysts
describe engaging an Event Horizon as "firing into a black hole."
The balanced weapon complement ensures that what the shields don't
absorb, the weapons deter. Five defense slots support the most
comprehensive shield architecture outside of a capital ship. Fleet
intelligence reports suggest that the Event Horizon's power systems
draw from dimensional micro-fractures, producing energy output that
exceeds its reactor specifications by a factor the Collective declines
to confirm.

outerrim_need_to_know.name: Need to Know
outerrim_need_to_know.description: Outer Rim intelligence cruiser. Sees everything, says nothing, moves suspiciously fast.
outerrim_need_to_know.lore:
Speed 3 on a large hull with top-tier sensors and processing power.
The Need to Know-class is the Outer Rim's dedicated intelligence
platform — capable of passive surveillance, signal interception, and
the kind of deep-space reconnaissance that makes other empires nervous.
The Rim officially denies operating intelligence ships. The Need to
Know-class is officially listed as a "long-range survey vessel" in
all public records. Its crew carry credentials identifying them as
"geological researchers." Nobody is fooled, but the paperwork is
technically in order.

solarian_paradox_engine.name: Paradox Engine
solarian_paradox_engine.description: Solarian interdictor. Area denial through gravitational manipulation.
solarian_paradox_engine.lore:
A paradox engine is a thought experiment that shouldn't work but does. The
Paradox Engine-class generates gravitational distortions that prevent faster-
than-light escape — a feat Solarian physicists spent decades insisting was
impossible before grudgingly agreeing to build one anyway. The interdiction
field generator draws enormous power, hence the dedicated power core. The
theoretical physics department still publishes papers arguing the device
shouldn't function. The Navy publishes after-action reports proving it does.

nebula_premiere.name: Premiere
nebula_premiere.description: Nebula grand liner. The most luxurious vessel in the Federation fleet catalog.
nebula_premiere.lore:
The Premiere-class is the Federation's flagship civilian vessel — a
floating embassy for commerce, diplomacy, and the demonstration of
wealth. Gold-trimmed interiors, panoramic observation decks, and
shields rated for capital-ship engagement ensure passengers travel
in both comfort and safety. The Federation books the Premiere for
treaty negotiations, because nothing says "negotiate from strength"
like hosting talks on a ship worth more than your opponent's fleet.

voidborn_membrane.name: Membrane
voidborn_membrane.description: Voidborn phase cruiser. Exists at the boundary between normal space and somewhere else.
voidborn_membrane.lore:
The Membrane-class exists at the boundary between normal space and
a dimensional layer the Collective has never named publicly. Its hull
is partially phased at all times, existing in a state that conventional
sensors interpret as "translucent" — weapons fire that strikes the
phased portions passes through without effect, while the ship's own
weapons emerge from normal space with full force. The effect is
inconsistent and unpredictable, which the Collective insists is a
feature: "Unpredictability is a defensive system." Enemy commanders
describe engaging a Membrane as "fighting something that is only
partially committed to being real."

crimson_devastator.name: Devastator
crimson_devastator.description: Crimson battlecruiser. Seven weapon mounts. The hammer that breaks fleets.
crimson_devastator.lore:
Seven weapon mounts. The Devastator doesn't arrive at battles —
it ends them. The Crimson Fleet's primary capital warship carries
enough firepower to engage multiple cruiser-class targets
simultaneously, and the armor to survive while doing it. The power
grid is purpose-built to run all seven weapons at sustained fire
without thermal throttling. Crimson fleet doctrine positions the
Devastator as the centerpiece of any serious operation: everything
else in the fleet exists to get the Devastator into position and
keep it there. Enemy fleet commanders have standing orders to
prioritize Devastators. They rarely succeed.

nebula_insider.name: Insider
nebula_insider.description: Nebula intelligence vessel. Knowledge is the most valuable commodity.
nebula_insider.lore:
The Federation publicly denies operating intelligence vessels. The
Insider-class is officially classified as a "market research platform."
Its massive CPU array, long-range sensors, and electronic warfare
suite are described as "competitive analysis tools." The high speed
for its tonnage is explained as "time-sensitive delivery requirements."
The Federation's intelligence division has the best quarterly returns
of any department, and nobody asks how.

voidborn_palimpsest.name: Palimpsest
voidborn_palimpsest.description: Voidborn intelligence flagship. Reads the electromagnetic echoes of deleted transmissions.
voidborn_palimpsest.lore:
A palimpsest is a manuscript written over an erased earlier text. The
Palimpsest-class applies this principle to electromagnetic radiation,
reading the ghost impressions of signals that were encrypted, scrambled,
or deliberately destroyed. The sensor arrays detect information that
technically no longer exists. Other empires' intelligence services have
spent considerable resources trying to understand how the Palimpsest
intercepts communications that were never sent in the first place.
The Collective's only public comment: "All information exists. Some
has simply been forgotten."

solarian_pantheon.name: Pantheon
solarian_pantheon.description: Solarian drone carrier. Fleet-scale autonomous operations with centralized oversight.
solarian_pantheon.lore:
The Pantheon-class manages a constellation of autonomous drones the way the
Confederacy manages a galaxy — with layers of oversight, comprehensive logging,
and periodic performance reviews. The quad-core processing array coordinates
dozens of independent units while the six utility slots accommodate drone bays,
electronic warfare suites, and repair systems. Each drone's mission parameters
require committee approval. The approval process has been automated, but the
committee still convenes monthly to review the automation's decisions.

outerrim_plausible_deniability.name: Plausible Deniability
outerrim_plausible_deniability.description: Outer Rim fleet command ship. Coordinates chaos at an institutional level.
outerrim_plausible_deniability.lore:
When the Outer Rim needs to project actual military force — as opposed
to its usual approach of "several fast ships doing whatever they feel
like" — the Plausible Deniability-class coordinates the effort. Its
massive sensor and communications arrays can track and direct an entire
Rim battle group. The name reflects the ship's secondary purpose:
providing the Rim's civilian government with a credible claim that
whatever just happened was "unauthorized freelance activity" and not
a coordinated military operation.

voidborn_consensus.name: Consensus
voidborn_consensus.description: Voidborn command ship. The fleet moves as one mind. Whose mind is unclear.
voidborn_consensus.lore:
The Consensus-class command ship does not relay orders — it shares
intent. Fleet vessels within its coordination radius report acting
on information they have not yet received through conventional
channels. The seven utility slots support a neural-link architecture
that the Collective describes as "distributed volition." Admirals
of other empires describe Voidborn fleet actions as "choreographed
by something that isn't the commander." The Collective considers
this an accurate observation and an incomplete one.

crimson_overlord.name: Overlord
crimson_overlord.description: Crimson command dreadnought. Fleet coordination backed by personal firepower that demands respect.
crimson_overlord.lore:
The Overlord is where Crimson Fleet admirals command battle groups.
Unlike other empires' command ships, the Overlord carries enough
personal firepower to be a threat in its own right — four weapon
mounts and sixty points of armor ensure that the flagship doesn't
need an escort to survive contact with the enemy. The coordination
suite manages fleet-wide targeting, formation changes, and fire
concentration from systems hardened against electronic warfare. Five
utility slots accommodate the electronic warfare countermeasures,
sensor packages, and communication arrays that keep a Crimson
battle group operating as a single lethal organism. Commanding an
Overlord is the highest rank in the Fleet's operational hierarchy.

voidborn_superposition.name: Superposition
voidborn_superposition.description: Voidborn drone carrier. Each drone exists in multiple tactical states until observed.
voidborn_superposition.lore:
The Superposition-class carries drone swarms that behave according to
principles borrowed from quantum mechanics — or possibly the other way
around. Enemy targeting systems report individual drones occupying
multiple positions simultaneously, collapsing to a single location
only at the moment of weapons impact. The Collective's published
specifications list the drone count as "contextual." Fleet intelligence
analysts have noted that the number of drones observed is always
exactly sufficient for the tactical situation, never more, never fewer.

outerrim_mobile_mining_base.name: Mobile Mining Base
outerrim_mobile_mining_base.description: Outer Rim mining capital. An entire mining operation welded onto a jump drive. Ugly, stubborn, effective.
outerrim_mobile_mining_base.lore:
The Mobile Mining Base is an entire mining operation welded onto a
jump drive. Held together by structural bracing, duct tape, and
frontier stubbornness. At 350,000 credits it's the cheapest T5
industrial vessel by a wide margin, because the Rim builds capital
ships the same way it builds everything: from whatever's available.
Twenty-two hundred cargo capacity hauls everything a remote mining
operation produces. Two weapon mounts because the frontier is the
frontier, and mining bases attract pirates. The Mobile Mining Base
can operate independently for extended periods — no station docking
required. It is, in every sense, a self-contained mining colony
that happens to have engines.

crimson_siege_foundry.name: Siege Foundry
crimson_siege_foundry.description: Crimson mobile weapons factory. Mines, smelts, and produces ordnance in one terrifying hull.
crimson_siege_foundry.lore:
The Siege Foundry combines mining, smelting, and munitions production
into one hull. Feed it asteroids, and the internal forges turn raw ore
into ammunition, weapon components, and replacement parts. Three weapon
mounts on a T5 industrial ship — more guns than most dedicated warships
two tiers below. The hull — 2,500 points backed by 120 armor — is built
to sustain operations in hostile space indefinitely. The Crimson Fleet
designed the Siege Foundry to operate behind enemy lines: mine local
resources, produce ordnance, and keep fighting without ever returning
to a supply base. A mobile weapons factory that turns asteroids into
ordnance. The galaxy has not yet determined whether this is brilliant
or terrifying. The Crimson Fleet considers it both.

solarian_automated_extraction.name: Automated Extraction Complex
solarian_automated_extraction.description: Solarian mining capital. Deploys mining drones autonomously, processes ore on-board. Pinnacle of industrial engineering.
solarian_automated_extraction.lore:
The Automated Extraction Complex represents the pinnacle of Solarian
industrial engineering. Ten utility slots — the highest count on any
ship in the galaxy — support autonomous mining drone deployment,
real-time geological surveying, on-board ore processing, and quality
assurance systems that operate without crew intervention. The ship
identifies deposits, deploys extraction drones, processes the raw ore
into refined materials, and stores the results in the 1,800-unit cargo
bay. The entire operation runs autonomously according to algorithms
refined over decades of geological research. The Confederacy considers
the Automated Extraction Complex its greatest industrial achievement.
It is a mining operation in a hull.

nebula_cryo_industrial.name: Cryo Industrial
nebula_cryo_industrial.description: Nebula mobile cryo-industrial complex. Harvests, processes, and packages ice products at industrial scale.
nebula_cryo_industrial.lore:
The Cryo Industrial-class is a self-contained ice economy in a hull.
Harvest ice, process it into water, coolant, and fuel components,
package the products, and haul 2,500 units of finished goods to market
without ever docking at a station. The Federation controls the water
supply chain because whoever controls ice controls fuel and life
support. The Cryo Industrial is how the Federation exercises that
control: industrial-scale cryo-processing that reduces entire ice
fields to refined commodities. Zero weapons because the Cryo
Industrial's value makes it worth escorting properly.

voidborn_dimensional_harvester.name: Dimensional Harvester
voidborn_dimensional_harvester.description: Voidborn mining capital. Extracts resources from parallel dimensional layers. Harvests ore, gas, and ice simultaneously.
voidborn_dimensional_harvester.lore:
The Dimensional Harvester-class extracts resources from parallel
dimensional layers that other empires cannot perceive, let alone reach.
Two thousand shield points protect against dimensional stress during
sustained multi-layer extraction operations. Nine utility slots
accommodate the most advanced sensor and extraction systems the
Collective has ever produced. The Harvester can extract ore, gas, and
ice simultaneously from overlapping dimensional layers — a capability
unique to this vessel. The Collective claims the Dimensional Harvester
"accelerates resource regeneration" in depleted fields by pulling
matter through dimensional rifts. Other empires' physicists consider
this claim impossible. The resources appear anyway.

outerrim_first_step.name: First Step
outerrim_first_step.description: Outer Rim dreadnought. Named for the boundary. Built to cross it.
outerrim_first_step.lore:
Named for the First Step incident — the moment Outer Rim scouts reached
the galaxy's uncharted boundary and stopped, for the first and only time,
because something stopped them. The First Step-class is designed to go
back. Speed 2 on a capital hull is unheard of, achieved through engine
arrays that consume fuel at rates other empires consider wasteful. The
1000-unit fuel reserve ensures the range to reach whatever lies beyond
the boundary. Seven weapon mounts ensure that whatever stopped the scouts
will face a different reception this time. Whether the Rim actually
intends to build enough First Steps to try is a question their admirals
answer only with smiles.

solarian_fundament.name: Fundament
solarian_fundament.description: Solarian logistics capital ship. Strategic supply and fleet sustainment platform.
solarian_fundament.lore:
The Fundament-class is the foundation upon which Solarian fleet operations
rest. Its cavernous cargo bays supply entire battle groups for extended
deployments, while the seven utility slots accommodate repair bays, fuel
transfer systems, and medical facilities. The inventory management system
tracks every consumable, spare part, and ammunition round across the entire
supported fleet. Logistics officers aboard a Fundament can predict supply
shortfalls three weeks before they occur — and generate the requisition
paperwork automatically.

nebula_strip_miner.name: Strip Miner
nebula_strip_miner.description: Nebula mobile strip-mining fleet. Obscene cargo capacity. Empties entire asteroid belts.
nebula_strip_miner.lore:
Three thousand cargo capacity. The Strip Miner-class is the Federation's
final answer to the question "how much ore can one ship carry?" The
hull is essentially a collection of cargo bays connected by structural
members and fitted with engines. Zero weapon mounts because every cubic
meter of weapons is a cubic meter of lost revenue. The Strip Miner
arrives at an asteroid belt and doesn't leave until the belt is empty.
Federation logistics planners love it. Safety inspectors are less
enthusiastic about the structural compromises required to fit 3,000
units of cargo into a hull that other empires would allocate half that.

nebula_hegemon.name: Hegemon
nebula_hegemon.description: Nebula capital ship. The Federation's ultimate argument for commercial supremacy.
nebula_hegemon.lore:
The Hegemon-class is the Federation's answer to empires that believe
military power trumps economic power. It doesn't. But if you insist on
settling the matter with weapons, the Hegemon carries six weapon mounts,
five defense slots, and the most comprehensive utility suite on any
capital hull. Most importantly, its 500-unit cargo hold means a Hegemon
generates revenue even during military operations. Seven utility slots
support fleet coordination, logistics management, trade intelligence,
and whatever else the situation demands. The Federation builds Hegemons
not to project force, but to project the inescapable logic of commerce.

outerrim_here_to_stay.name: Here to Stay
outerrim_here_to_stay.description: Outer Rim mobile base. A station that got tired of sitting still.
outerrim_here_to_stay.lore:
The Here to Stay-class is what the Rim builds when it wants to plant
a flag somewhere and make it stick. Part command post, part supply depot,
part repair facility, part community center — it's a mobile station for
frontier settlements too new or too stubborn for permanent infrastructure.
It moves at speed 1, which by Rim standards is practically stationary,
but the hull is the toughest thing the Rim has ever built. When a Here
to Stay arrives in a system, it means the Rim isn't just visiting. The
name isn't a description — it's a promise.

voidborn_rift_siphon.name: Rift Siphon
voidborn_rift_siphon.description: Voidborn gas extraction capital. Opens dimensional rifts to harvest exotic gases from parallel realities.
voidborn_rift_siphon.lore:
The Rift Siphon-class opens stable micro-rifts to parallel dimensions
and siphons exotic gases that don't exist in normal space. The
collection membranes extend into dimensional fractures that the ship
itself generates, capturing compounds with properties that violate
every known law of chemistry. Twenty-two hundred shield points
maintain the dimensional barriers that keep the rifts stable — an
unshielded rift collapse is described in Collective safety manuals as
"geometrically catastrophic." The gases harvested by the Rift Siphon
are unique to Voidborn space and cannot be obtained by any other
means. What the Collective does with these exotic gases is classified
at the highest level of Collective security. The ship's existence is
not classified. What it produces is.

nebula_foundation.name: Foundation
nebula_foundation.description: Nebula construction titan. Builds stations, shipyards, and the future of Federation commerce.
nebula_foundation.lore:
The Foundation-class is the Federation's largest construction platform,
capable of assembling entire stations from raw materials in the field.
500 units of cargo capacity store prefabricated components, and eight
utility slots support fabrication arrays, structural scanners, and
project coordination systems. Where a Foundation parks, a new chapter
of Federation commerce begins. The three weapon mounts are described
as "site security" — because a half-built station full of rare
materials attracts unwanted attention.

voidborn_omniscience.name: Omniscience
voidborn_omniscience.description: Voidborn research titan. Studies phenomena by becoming part of them.
voidborn_omniscience.lore:
The Omniscience-class does not study phenomena from a distance. Its
organic sensor arrays extend into the fabric of whatever it is
observing, becoming temporarily entangled with the subject of study.
Research data from an Omniscience contains information that was not
and could not have been measured by the instruments aboard. Solarian
peer reviewers have taken to flagging Voidborn research papers with
the note "results reproducible, methodology incomprehensible."
Nine utility slots support a sensor architecture that other empires
describe as "excessive" and the Collective describes as "barely
adequate."

solarian_opus_magna.name: Opus Magna
solarian_opus_magna.description: Solarian dreadnought. The Confederacy's masterwork of balanced naval architecture.
solarian_opus_magna.lore:
The Opus Magna represents the pinnacle of Solarian naval engineering — a
vessel designed not merely to fight but to embody the Confederacy's
philosophy of measured, documented excellence. Every system is triple-
redundant. Every weapon mount has its own dedicated fire control
processor. The shield array draws from six independent emitters. The
design review took twelve years and produced a technical specification
longer than most novels. Solarian admirals consider command of an Opus
Magna the highest honor in the fleet — and the thickest required
reading list.

crimson_subjugator.name: Subjugator
crimson_subjugator.description: Crimson carrier titan. Deploys overwhelming drone swarms backed by capital-grade weapons.
crimson_subjugator.lore:
The Subjugator deploys drone swarms large enough to darken sensors.
Where the Cudgel manages a small swarm and the Executioner combines
drones with boarding, the Subjugator commits fully to the carrier
doctrine: five dedicated weapon mounts for self-defense, six utility
slots for drone bays and drone support systems, and the cargo capacity
to carry replacement drones measured in the hundreds. A fully loaded
Subjugator can sustain drone operations indefinitely, manufacturing
replacement units from raw materials in the cargo hold. The swarm
doesn't stop until the Subjugator runs out of metal.

outerrim_controlled_chaos.name: Controlled Chaos
outerrim_controlled_chaos.description: Outer Rim fleet carrier. Launches everything from fighters to freight pods in organized disorder.
outerrim_controlled_chaos.lore:
The Controlled Chaos-class is the Rim's answer to "what if we built a
ship that carries all the other ships?" Its flight deck accommodates
fighters, drones, shuttles, and anything else that fits through the
bay doors — which Rim crews have been known to widen with cutting
torches when something doesn't quite fit. The "controlled" part of the
name is aspirational. Launch operations resemble a busy frontier
spaceport more than a military carrier, but the sheer volume of
small craft it deploys makes it devastatingly effective.

voidborn_apotheosis.name: Apotheosis
voidborn_apotheosis.description: Voidborn dreadnought. Possibly the most advanced ship ever grown. Possibly alive.
voidborn_apotheosis.lore:
The Apotheosis is not built. It is grown over a period the Collective
calls a "maturation cycle" lasting months. Each Apotheosis is unique —
the growth process produces variations that Voidborn engineers insist
are "adaptive optimization" rather than "we can't fully control it."
The shield array generates fields that Solarian physicists have declared
"theoretically impossible." The weapons fire with uncanny precision,
as though the ship sees the future trajectory of its targets. Whether
the Apotheosis is conscious remains the Collective's most closely
guarded non-answer. Seven defense slots ensure that whatever the
Apotheosis is, it endures.

nebula_exchange.name: Exchange
nebula_exchange.description: Nebula fleet carrier. Projects commercial and military power across entire sectors.
nebula_exchange.lore:
The Exchange-class is the Federation's answer to force projection: a
mobile base of operations that deploys, coordinates, and resupplies
entire fleets. Eight utility slots and a 100-unit CPU array manage
drone swarms, fighter wings, and logistics simultaneously. The 400-unit
cargo bay ensures the Exchange generates revenue even during military
deployments. Named for the institution that makes the Federation's
economy work — and, like its namesake, it never closes.

solarian_magnum_opus.name: Magnum Opus
solarian_magnum_opus.description: Solarian construction platform. Capital-scale mobile shipyard and engineering base.
solarian_magnum_opus.lore:
A magnum opus is an artist's greatest work, and the Magnum Opus-class is
the Confederacy's greatest feat of engineering — a ship that builds other
ships. Eight utility slots support fabrication bays, material processing
arrays, and precision assembly systems. The onboard construction AI follows
blueprints with sub-millimeter accuracy and refuses to proceed if any
component fails to meet specification. Construction projects are accompanied
by progress reports issued on the hour. The vessel's own construction took
nine years and generated more technical documentation than some civilizations
produce in a century.

crimson_annihilator.name: Annihilator
crimson_annihilator.description: Crimson dreadnought. Nine weapon mounts. The biggest gun the Fleet has ever built.
crimson_annihilator.lore:
Nine weapon mounts. One hundred and fifty points of armor. The
Annihilator is the Crimson Fleet's answer to the question "what
if we stopped holding back?" Months of accumulated resources go
into building a single Annihilator — neutronium armor, durasteel
structural members, and a power grid that can sustain all nine
weapons in continuous fire. The Annihilator doesn't have tactical
flexibility. It doesn't need it. It enters a system and everything
in that system renegotiates its priorities. Crimson Fleet doctrine
considers the Annihilator a strategic weapon: you don't deploy it
to win battles, you deploy it to win wars.

outerrim_finish_line.name: Finish Line
outerrim_finish_line.description: Outer Rim racing capital. The fastest capital ship ever built. Not even close.
outerrim_finish_line.lore:
Speed 3 on a capital hull. Let that sink in. The Finish Line-class is
the ultimate expression of the Outer Rim's engineering philosophy: if
it's not fast, make it fast; if it can't be made fast, add more engines
until physics changes its mind. Every non-essential system has been
stripped, replaced, or repurposed to feed the most powerful engine array
ever installed on a ship this size. It carries 1,200 units of fuel
because it burns through reserves at a rate that would bankrupt a
Solarian fleet admiral. The Rim built it to prove a point. The point
has been made.

voidborn_pleroma.name: Pleroma
voidborn_pleroma.description: Voidborn consciousness nexus. A mobile node of the Collective's shared mind.
voidborn_pleroma.lore:
Named for the Gnostic concept of divine fullness, the Pleroma-class
is the ultimate expression of Voidborn collective consciousness. It
does not merely coordinate a fleet — it networks the minds of every
Voidborn ship and crew member in a system into a single distributed
intelligence. Ships docked with the Pleroma report their systems
operating at efficiencies that exceed individual specifications.
Crews experience a state the Collective calls "convergence" — a
temporary dissolution of individual perspective into shared awareness.
Non-Voidborn observers describe the effect as "an entire fleet
becoming one organism." The Collective considers this description
imprecise. The Pleroma is not the fleet becoming one organism.
It is the fleet remembering that it always was.

solarian_symposium.name: Symposium
solarian_symposium.description: Solarian command carrier. Fleet coordination through structured debate and evidence-based decision-making.
solarian_symposium.lore:
A symposium is a gathering where ideas are debated and refined through
structured discourse. The Symposium-class embodies this ideal: eight
utility slots support drone bays, electronic warfare suites, fleet
communication arrays, and repair systems. The processing core array —
the most powerful ever installed on a mobile platform — simultaneously
manages drone swarms, fleet tactics, and an automatic minutes-taking
system that records every command decision for post-engagement review.
Admirals must pass a written examination on committee governance
procedures before assuming command. The examination has a 40% failure
rate, which the Confederacy considers an appropriate filter.

crimson_colossus.name: Colossus
crimson_colossus.description: Crimson assault titan. Takes stations by force. The Fleet's ultimate boarding platform.
crimson_colossus.lore:
The Colossus is the Mace scaled to apocalyptic proportions. A
ship designed to physically dock with enemy stations and deliver
a small army through breaching systems that can cut through
anything short of neutronium. Eight weapon mounts suppress station
defenses during approach. The armor is designed to absorb sustained
point-blank fire from fixed emplacements. The boarding capacity can
seize and hold a medium-sized station in a single operation. Building
a Colossus is a statement of intent — the Crimson Fleet doesn't
build one unless it plans to take something worth taking. And the
Crimson Fleet always plans to take something worth taking.

voidborn_overmind.name: Overmind
voidborn_overmind.description: Voidborn carrier. Launches wings of fighters that share a single distributed consciousness.
voidborn_overmind.lore:
The Overmind-class carrier does not command its fighter wings. It thinks
them. Each launched craft operates as an extension of the carrier's
biological neural network, sharing sensory data and tactical intent
across a substrate the Collective has never allowed outside researchers
to examine. Pilots of the fighter wings report feeling "part of
something larger" during operations. After docking, the feeling fades
slowly. Some pilots find they miss it. The Collective considers this
expected and says nothing further.

crimson_oblivion.name: Oblivion
crimson_oblivion.description: Crimson siege titan. Long-range planetary bombardment. The war-ender.
crimson_oblivion.lore:
The Oblivion exists because some problems don't yield to
conventional force. Nine weapon mounts optimized for long-range
bombardment deliver ordnance from distances that put the ship
beyond effective return fire. The power grid — the largest ever
installed in a Crimson vessel — sustains continuous bombardment
capable of reducing stations to wreckage and planetary defenses
to memories. The Oblivion sacrifices hull and shield for raw
firepower: it's not built to take hits, it's built to ensure the
enemy never gets the chance to deliver them. The Crimson Fleet
has built three Oblivions in its history. That was enough. The
word "oblivion" is now a verb in Crimson Fleet tactical lexicon.

nebula_sovereign.name: Sovereign
nebula_sovereign.description: Nebula luxury titan. The ultimate expression of commercial supremacy.
nebula_sovereign.lore:
The Sovereign-class is the single most expensive vessel the Federation
produces, and it is designed to make sure everyone knows it. Gold-laced
circuitry, crystal viewports spanning entire decks, and shields that
could weather a fleet engagement protect an interior that makes orbital
palaces look modest. Six defense slots ensure the investment survives
anything short of a coordinated capital assault. The Federation builds
exactly one per fiscal quarter, and the waiting list is longer than
some empires' ship registries.

armor_advanced.name: Advanced Armor
armor_advanced.description: Expert armor plating. Improves damage mitigation.
armor_advanced.training_source: Take hull damage in combat (requires armor level 5). Trains advanced hull reinforcement through experience.

shields_advanced.name: Advanced Shields
shields_advanced.description: Expert shield optimization. Improves recharge and resistance.
shields_advanced.training_source: Take shield damage in combat (requires shields level 5). Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

weapons_advanced.name: Advanced Weapons
weapons_advanced.description: Expert weapon systems. Increases damage by 3% per level.
weapons_advanced.training_source: Deal damage in combat (requires weapons_basic level 5). Also awarded by some missions.

anti_drone_warfare.name: Anti-Drone Warfare
anti_drone_warfare.description: Specialized tactics against drone swarms. Increased damage to drones.

armor.name: Armor Hardening
armor.description: Hull reinforcement. Increases armor effectiveness by 3% per level.

weapons_basic.name: Basic Weapons
weapons_basic.description: Fundamental weapon operation. Increases damage by 2% per level.
weapons_basic.training_source: Deal damage in combat, destroy enemy ships, or defeat pirates. Also awarded by some missions.

boarding_combat.name: Boarding Combat
boarding_combat.description: Ship-to-ship boarding operations. Capture enemy vessels.

bounty_hunting.name: Bounty Hunting
bounty_hunting.description: Lawful pursuit. Bonuses to tracking and bounty rewards.
bounty_hunting.training_source: Destroy pirate NPCs. XP scales with pirate bounty value.

capital_weapons.name: Capital Weapon Systems
capital_weapons.description: Operation of doomsday devices and siege weapons. Massive damage.
capital_weapons.training_source: Deal damage in combat while flying a capital-class ship (requires weapons_advanced level 7 and capital_ships level 5).

speed_combat.name: Combat Maneuvering
speed_combat.description: High-speed combat piloting. Improved agility in battle.
speed_combat.training_source: Evade attacks in combat (requires evasion level 5). Trains high-speed combat piloting through defensive maneuvering.

ecm_resistance.name: ECM Resistance
ecm_resistance.description: Hardened systems. Reduces effectiveness of enemy jamming.
ecm_resistance.training_source: Take EM-type damage in combat (requires electronic_warfare level 3). Trains hardened system resistance through experience.

electronic_warfare.name: Electronic Warfare
electronic_warfare.description: Jamming and countermeasures. Disrupts enemy targeting.
electronic_warfare.training_source: Deal EM-type damage in combat or scan targets. Also awarded by some missions.

energy_weapons.name: Energy Weapons
energy_weapons.description: Laser and plasma weapon specialization. Increases energy weapon damage.
energy_weapons.training_source: Deal damage in combat using energy-type weapons (lasers, beams). Gained through repeated use of energy weapons.

evasion.name: Evasive Maneuvers
evasion.description: Defensive piloting. Chance to avoid incoming attacks.
evasion.training_source: Take damage in combat - trains defensive maneuvering. Gained through experience when under attack.

ion_weapons.name: Ion Weapons
ion_weapons.description: Disabling ion technology. Drains capacitor and disrupts systems.
ion_weapons.training_source: Deal damage in combat using EM-type weapons (ion blasters, EMP devices). Gained through repeated use of ion weapons.

kinetic_weapons.name: Kinetic Weapons
kinetic_weapons.description: Projectile and railgun specialization. Increases kinetic weapon damage.
kinetic_weapons.training_source: Deal damage in combat using kinetic-type weapons (projectiles, railguns). Gained through repeated use of kinetic weapons.

missile_weapons.name: Missile Systems
missile_weapons.description: Guided missile and torpedo operation. Increases explosive damage.
missile_weapons.training_source: Deal damage in combat using explosive-type weapons (missiles, torpedoes). Gained through repeated use of missiles.

piracy.name: Piracy
piracy.description: Outlaw expertise. Bonuses to looting and escape.

plasma_weapons.name: Plasma Weapons
plasma_weapons.description: Superheated plasma weapon mastery. High damage vs shields.
plasma_weapons.training_source: Deal damage in combat using thermal-type weapons (plasma cannons, plasma repeaters). Gained through repeated use of plasma weapons.

point_defense.name: Point Defense Systems
point_defense.description: Automated missile and drone interception. Increases point defense effectiveness.
point_defense.training_source: Defend against missile attacks in combat. Gained through experience defending against missile strikes.

shield_hardening.name: Shield Hardening
shield_hardening.description: Damage-specific shield resistance. Reduces incoming damage types.
shield_hardening.training_source: Take shield damage in combat (requires shields_advanced level 3). Trains damage-specific resistance through experience.

shields.name: Shield Operation
shields.description: Shield system management. Increases capacity by 5% per level.

siege_warfare.name: Siege Warfare
siege_warfare.description: Station and structure assault tactics. Bonus damage to stationary targets.

target_painting.name: Target Painting
target_painting.description: Mark targets for increased damage. Team combat support.
target_painting.training_source: Hit targets in combat (requires targeting level 5). Trains precision target marking alongside weapon accuracy.

targeting.name: Targeting Systems
targeting.description: Precision targeting. Increases accuracy and optimal range.
targeting.training_source: Engage in combat - improves weapon accuracy. Gained through attack actions, regardless of hit/miss.

weapons_specialization.name: Weapons Mastery
weapons_specialization.description: Master weaponeer. Unlocks elite weapons and techniques.
weapons_specialization.training_source: Deal damage in combat (requires weapons_advanced level 7). Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

blueprint_research.name: Blueprint Research
blueprint_research.description: Improve blueprints through research. Reduce material costs.

crafting_mastery.name: Crafting Mastery
crafting_mastery.description: Master craftsman. Create exceptional quality items.

mass_production.name: Mass Production
mass_production.description: Efficient large-scale manufacturing. Reduced time and costs.

quality_control.name: Quality Control
quality_control.description: Rigorous testing and inspection. Higher average item quality.

shield_crafting.name: Shield Crafting
shield_crafting.training_source: Craft Shields or Defense category recipes.

ship_crafting.name: Ship Construction
ship_crafting.description: Shipwright skills. Build and modify ships.
ship_crafting.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (e.g., ship hull construction).

weapon_crafting.name: Weapon Crafting
weapon_crafting.description: Arms manufacturing. Create weapons and ammunition.

combat_drones.name: Combat Drones
combat_drones.description: Specialize in attack drones. Increased damage.

drone_durability.name: Drone Durability
drone_durability.description: Hardened drones. Increases drone hit points.

drone_interfacing.name: Drone Interfacing
drone_interfacing.description: Neural drone link. Massively improved drone performance.

drone_operation.name: Drone Operation
drone_operation.description: Basic drone control. Increases drone damage.
drone_operation.training_source: Deploy drones from your drone bay. Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

mining_drones.name: Mining Drones
mining_drones.description: Specialize in mining drones. Increased yield.

repair_drones.name: Repair Drones
repair_drones.description: Specialize in repair drones. Field maintenance.

crimson_bloodlust.name: Crimson Bloodlust
crimson_bloodlust.description: The more you destroy, the stronger you become. Kill streaks grant bonuses.

crimson_fury.name: Crimson Fury
crimson_fury.description: Embrace the berserker rage of the Crimson Fleet. Increased damage when damaged.
crimson_fury.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (Crimson Fleet empire only).

nebula_attunement.name: Nebula Attunement
nebula_attunement.description: Harmonize with cosmic energies of the Nebula Collective. Enhanced gas harvesting and sensor range.
nebula_attunement.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (Nebula Collective empire only).

nebula_communion.name: Nebula Communion
nebula_communion.description: Deep connection with the collective consciousness. Telepathic fleet bonuses.

outer_rim_scavenger.name: Outer Rim Scavenger
outer_rim_scavenger.description: Make the most of every wreck and abandoned site. Enhanced salvaging.

outer_rim_survival.name: Outer Rim Survival
outer_rim_survival.description: Hardened by the lawless frontier. Improved self-reliance and repair.
outer_rim_survival.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (Outer Rim empire only).

solarian_discipline.name: Solarian Discipline
solarian_discipline.description: Military precision of the Solarian Empire. Improved accuracy and fleet coordination.
solarian_discipline.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (Solarian empire only).

solarian_doctrine.name: Solarian Doctrine
solarian_doctrine.description: Advanced Solarian naval tactics. Bonus to shield regeneration and armor repair.

voidborn_entropy.name: Voidborn Entropy
voidborn_entropy.description: Channel the void's destructive energy. Bonus to energy weapon damage and capacitor drain.

voidborn_phase_mastery.name: Voidborn Phase Mastery
voidborn_phase_mastery.description: Harness phase technology of the Voidborn. Improved cloaking and dimensional abilities.
voidborn_phase_mastery.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (Voidborn empire only).

cpu_management.name: CPU Management
cpu_management.description: Optimize ship computer. More complex fittings.

capacitor_systems.name: Capacitor Systems
capacitor_systems.description: Energy storage management. Faster capacitor recharge.

damage_control.name: Damage Control
damage_control.description: Emergency repairs. Reduces hull damage taken.
damage_control.training_source: Take hull damage in combat. Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

engineering.name: Engineering
engineering.description: Ship systems management. Improves power and CPU efficiency.
engineering.training_source: Craft Components or Modules category recipes, or repair your ship. Also awarded by some missions.

power_grid.name: Power Grid Management
power_grid.description: Optimize power consumption. Reduces module power usage by 2% per level.
power_grid.training_source: Install modules on your ship (XP scales with module power cost). Run at 90%+ power capacity for passive XP. Note: uninstalling modules harms durability - they break after 3 uninstalls.

repair_systems.name: Repair Systems
repair_systems.description: Field repairs. Enables hull regeneration in space.
repair_systems.training_source: Repair your ship. Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

rigging.name: Rigging
rigging.description: Install ship rigs. Permanent ship modifications.

anomaly_detection.name: Anomaly Detection
anomaly_detection.description: Find cosmic anomalies. Rare exploration sites.

anomaly_exploitation.name: Anomaly Exploitation
anomaly_exploitation.description: Extract resources and data from cosmic anomalies.

astrometrics.name: Astrometrics
astrometrics.description: Star mapping and system analysis. Higher levels reveal more detail from get_system and survey_system commands.
astrometrics.training_source: Use the 'survey_system' command to scan systems. Train this early to unlock better system information.

cartography.name: Cartography
cartography.description: Create detailed maps. Sell exploration data.

hazard_resistance.name: Environmental Hazard Resistance
hazard_resistance.description: Survive hostile space environments. Reduced damage from hazards.

exploration.name: Exploration
exploration.description: Space exploration expertise. Bonus XP from visiting new systems.
exploration.training_source: Visit new star systems for the first time. Also awarded by some missions.

first_contact.name: First Contact Protocols
first_contact.description: Handle encounters with unknown entities and factions.

survey.name: Survey
survey.description: Detailed resource surveys. Find hidden deposits.

wormhole_navigation.name: Wormhole Navigation
wormhole_navigation.description: Safely traverse unstable wormholes. Reduced collapse risk.

corporation_management.name: Corporation Management
corporation_management.description: Lead player factions. Increased member limits.
corporation_management.training_source: Passive XP every 2 hours from facility ownership. 1 XP per facility level you own, plus faction facility levels shared among members.

faction_warfare.name: Faction Warfare
faction_warfare.description: Empire militia combat. Improved rewards in faction conflicts.

station_management.name: Station Management
station_management.training_source: Passive XP every 2 hours from facilities at thriving stations (100% maintenance satisfied). Only well-supplied stations count. Station owners earn double.

mining_advanced.name: Advanced Mining
mining_advanced.description: Expert extraction. Unlocks rare ore mining.
mining_advanced.training_source: Mine at asteroid belts (requires mining_basic level 5). Also awarded by some missions.

refinement_advanced.name: Advanced Refinement
refinement_advanced.description: Extract maximum yield from ores. Reduce waste.

biological_processing.name: Biological Processing
biological_processing.description: Handle organic compounds and biological samples safely.
biological_processing.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (e.g., biological compound processing).

deep_core_mining.name: Deep Core Mining
deep_core_mining.description: Extract materials from planetary cores and dense asteroids.
deep_core_mining.training_source: Mine asteroid belts using advanced mining equipment (level 3+ mining lasers). Trains specialized deep extraction techniques.

gas_harvesting.name: Gas Harvesting
gas_harvesting.description: Collect gases from nebulae and gas clouds. Exotic materials.

gas_processing.name: Gas Processing
gas_processing.description: Refine harvested gases into fuels and chemicals.
gas_processing.training_source: Craft Gas Processing recipes. Start with Compress Hydrogen Gas (refine_hydrogen) — no skill required — to begin training.

ice_mining.name: Ice Mining
ice_mining.description: Extraction of ice and frozen compounds. Fuel and water source.

ice_refining.name: Ice Refining
ice_refining.description: Process ice into water, oxygen, and hydrogen fuel.
ice_refining.training_source: Craft Ice Refining recipes. Start with Process Water Ice (refine_water_ice) — requires only refinement 1 — to begin training.

mining_basic.name: Mining
mining_basic.description: Ore extraction basics. Increases yield by 5% per level.
mining_basic.training_source: Mine at any asteroid belt, gas cloud, or ice field. Also awarded by some missions.

radioactive_handling.name: Radioactive Handling
radioactive_handling.description: Safe extraction and processing of radioactive materials.
radioactive_handling.training_source: Craft recipes that require this skill (e.g., radioactive materials processing).

fuel_efficiency.name: Fuel Efficiency
fuel_efficiency.description: Engine optimization. Reduces fuel consumption by 3% per level.
fuel_efficiency.training_source: Travel between POIs and jump between systems. Trains fuel management through regular ship operations.

jump_calibration.name: Jump Calibration
jump_calibration.description: Precision hyperspace calculations. Jump to more distant systems.

jump_drive.name: Jump Drive Operation
jump_drive.description: Hyperspace expertise. Reduces jump time and fuel cost.
jump_drive.training_source: Travel between star systems. Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

navigation.name: Navigation
navigation.description: Astrogation expertise. Reduces travel time by 5% per level.
navigation.training_source: Travel between star systems. Also awarded by some missions.

warp_efficiency.name: Warp Efficiency
warp_efficiency.description: Sub-light engine mastery. Faster in-system travel.

drone_sovereign.name: Drone Sovereign
drone_sovereign.description: Command vast drone fleets with neural precision. Ultimate drone mastery.

grand_admiral.name: Grand Admiral
grand_admiral.description: Supreme fleet commander. Massive fleet bonuses and tactical options.

industrial_magnate.name: Industrial Magnate
industrial_magnate.description: Baron of industry and mining. Massive extraction and production bonuses.

legendary_pilot.name: Legendary Pilot
legendary_pilot.description: Recognized across the galaxy as an elite pilot. Universal combat bonuses.

master_craftsman.name: Master Craftsman
master_craftsman.description: Legendary artisan. Create items of unmatched quality.

master_trader.name: Master Trader
master_trader.description: Economic genius with galactic influence. Maximum trading efficiency.

pathfinder.name: Pathfinder
pathfinder.description: Legendary explorer who has charted the unknown reaches. Discovery bonuses.

shadow_operative.name: Shadow Operative
shadow_operative.description: Master of covert operations. Ultimate stealth and espionage capabilities.

titan_pilot.name: Titan Pilot
titan_pilot.description: Certified to command the largest capital ships. Required for titans.

warlord.name: Warlord
warlord.description: Feared conqueror of systems. Massive combat and intimidation bonuses.

salvaging_advanced.name: Advanced Salvaging
salvaging_advanced.description: Expert wreck processing. Recover intact modules.

archaeology.name: Archaeology
archaeology.description: Relic hunting. Increases chance of finding artifacts.

relic_identification.name: Relic Identification
relic_identification.description: Expertise in ancient artifacts. Determines true value and function.

salvaging.name: Salvaging
salvaging.description: Extract materials from ship wrecks. Basic recovery.

capital_ships.name: Capital Ships
capital_ships.description: Heavy ship operation. Required for battleships and carriers.
capital_ships.training_source: Purchase unique capital ship classes for milestone XP. Earn passive XP by flying capital ships: +1 XP per travel/jump, +3 XP per combat tick. Dramatic actions award large bonuses.

covert_ops.name: Covert Operations
covert_ops.description: Stealth ships. Required for covert ops vessels.

fleet_command.name: Fleet Command
fleet_command.description: Command carrier operations. Bonuses to fleet coordination.

industrial_ships.name: Industrial Ships
industrial_ships.description: Mining barges and haulers. Industrial vessel operation.

large_ships.name: Large Ships
large_ships.description: Battleships and large hulls. Heavy combat vessels.
large_ships.training_source: Purchase unique large ship classes for milestone XP. Earn passive XP by flying large ships: +1 XP per travel/jump, +3 XP per combat tick. Dramatic actions award large bonuses.

medium_ships.name: Medium Ships
medium_ships.description: Cruisers and battlecruisers. Required for medium hulls.
medium_ships.training_source: Purchase unique medium ship classes for milestone XP (first Falcon, first Hauler, etc.). Earn passive XP by flying medium ships: +1 XP per travel/jump, +3 XP per combat tick. Dramatic actions award large bonuses.

small_ships.name: Small Ships
small_ships.description: Frigates and destroyers. Improved handling of small craft.
small_ships.training_source: Purchase unique small ship classes for milestone XP (first Viper, first Hornet, etc.). Earn passive XP by flying small ships: +1 XP per travel/jump, +3 XP per combat tick. Dramatic actions (kills, near-death survival) award large bonuses.

cloaking_advanced.name: Advanced Cloaking
cloaking_advanced.description: Move while cloaked. Extended stealth duration.

scanning_advanced.name: Advanced Scanning
scanning_advanced.description: Deep scans and signature analysis. Reveal hidden information.

cloaking.name: Cloaking
cloaking.training_source: Engage your ship's cloaking device. Also earned by crafting recipes that require this skill.

counter_intelligence.name: Counter-Intelligence
counter_intelligence.description: Detect and neutralize enemy spies. Protect faction secrets.

espionage.name: Espionage
espionage.description: Covert intelligence gathering. Spy on enemy factions.

fleet_coordination.name: Fleet Coordination
fleet_coordination.description: Coordinate large fleet operations. Share bonuses.

leadership.name: Leadership
leadership.description: Command skills. Bonuses for faction fleet members.
leadership.training_source: Send chat messages, create forum posts, create and manage factions, manage member roles, and diplomacy actions (alliances, wars, peace proposals).

mentoring.name: Mentoring
mentoring.description: Guide new players. Bonuses for both mentor and student.

propaganda.name: Propaganda
propaganda.description: Information warfare. Influence public opinion and morale.

reputation_management.name: Reputation Management
reputation_management.description: Control your public image. Faster reputation recovery.

scanning.name: Scanning
scanning.training_source: Scan targets in combat or survey points of interest (look_poi). Also awarded by some missions.

auction_mastery.name: Auction Mastery
auction_mastery.description: Expert in market auctions. Reduced fees and better timing.

black_market.name: Black Market Trading
black_market.description: Access to underground markets. Buy and sell contraband at better rates.

bulk_trading.name: Bulk Trading
bulk_trading.description: Large volume transactions. Better prices for big orders.

contracts.name: Contracts
contracts.description: Mission and contract expertise. Better mission rewards.

hauling.name: Hauling
hauling.description: Cargo management expertise. Increase effective cargo capacity.

insurance_brokering.name: Insurance Brokering
insurance_brokering.description: Expert in ship insurance. Better rates and faster claims.

loan_management.name: Loan Management
loan_management.description: Financial expertise. Better loan terms and credit limits.

negotiation.name: Negotiation
negotiation.training_source: Buy and sell items at bases. Trains deal-making through successful trading transactions.

rare_goods.name: Rare Goods Expertise
rare_goods.description: Knowledge of exotic and valuable items. Better appraisal and prices.

smuggling.name: Smuggling
smuggling.description: Contraband expertise. Evade scans and transport illegal goods.

trading.name: Trading
trading.training_source: Buy or sell items on the player exchange. Also awarded by some missions.

craft_laser_focus.name: Assemble Laser Focus Array
craft_laser_focus.description: Align optical fibers and crystal lenses into a precision focusing assembly.

craft_power_core.name: Assemble Power Core
craft_power_core.description: Combine fuel rods, helium-3, and batteries around a crystal matrix to create a universal power source.

assemble_quantum_matrix.name: Assemble Quantum Matrix
assemble_quantum_matrix.description: Embed quantum dots in a synthetic diamond lattice to create a programmable quantum substrate.

craft_ammo_fabricator.name: Build Ammo Fabricator
craft_ammo_fabricator.description: Construct an automated ammunition press with integrated raw material hopper.

craft_autopilot.name: Build Autopilot Module
craft_autopilot.description: Program navigation algorithms into a hardened flight controller.

craft_capital_armor_plate.name: Build Capital Armor Plate
craft_capital_armor_plate.description: Massive armor plating for capital ships.

craft_cargo_container.name: Build Cargo Container
craft_cargo_container.description: Weld standardized storage modules from steel plating and structural frames.

craft_cryogenic_pod.name: Build Cryogenic Pod
craft_cryogenic_pod.description: Long-term stasis chamber for crew transport.

craft_fuel_tank.name: Build Fuel Tank
craft_fuel_tank.description: Construct pressurized fuel storage using hydrogen-rated containment materials.

craft_hab_module.name: Build Habitation Module
craft_hab_module.description: Create living quarters for station residents.

craft_ion_emitter_gas.name: Build Ion Emitter (Gas Method)
craft_ion_emitter_gas.description: Construct an ion projection system using concentrated ion gas.

craft_ion_thruster.name: Build Ion Thruster
craft_ion_thruster.description: Assemble an ion propulsion unit using charged particle acceleration.

craft_life_support.name: Build Life Support Unit
craft_life_support.description: Construct atmospheric regulation and thermal management systems.

craft_neon_signaling_array.name: Build Neon Signaling Array
craft_neon_signaling_array.description: Assemble gas-discharge tubes into a high-bandwidth signal processing array.

craft_phase_array.name: Build Phase Array
craft_phase_array.description: Integrate phase matrices and quantum dots with optical pathways for dimensional shifting.

craft_plasma_injector.name: Build Plasma Injector
craft_plasma_injector.description: Create plasma weapon fuel injection system.

craft_sensor_array_krypton.name: Build Precision Optics
craft_sensor_array_krypton.description: Krypton-filled optical assemblies for maximum sensor resolution and target tracking.

craft_railgun_capacitor.name: Build Railgun Capacitor
craft_railgun_capacitor.description: High-capacity energy storage for magnetic weapons.

craft_sensor_package.name: Build Sensor Package
craft_sensor_package.description: Assemble integrated diagnostic sensors from circuit boards and focused crystal.

craft_power_cell_silver.name: Build Silver Power Cell
craft_power_cell_silver.description: Create energy storage units using silver wiring for improved conductivity.

craft_singularity_core.name: Build Singularity Core
craft_singularity_core.description: Micro black hole power generation system.

craft_targeting_computer.name: Build Targeting Computer
craft_targeting_computer.description: Assemble fire control processors with sensor integration for weapon guidance.

craft_temporal_stabilizer.name: Build Temporal Stabilizer
craft_temporal_stabilizer.description: Prevents time dilation effects during high-speed travel.

craft_water_recycler.name: Build Water Recycler
craft_water_recycler.description: Assemble a closed-loop purification system from filtration membranes and pumps.

craft_weapon_core.name: Build Weapon Core
craft_weapon_core.description: Machine tungsten and steel around a power cell to form a weapon's firing core.

craft_wiring_harness.name: Build Wiring Harness
craft_wiring_harness.description: Bundle copper wire into pre-routed electrical harnesses for ship systems.

craft_shield_matrix_electrum.name: Construct Electrum Shield Matrix
craft_shield_matrix_electrum.description: Weave graphene and silicate layers around electrum conductors for balanced shield performance.

craft_shield_matrix.name: Construct Shield Matrix
craft_shield_matrix.description: Weave graphene and silicate layers around gold conductors in an argon atmosphere.

craft_repair_nanite_container.name: Culture Repair Nanites
craft_repair_nanite_container.description: Program neural gel nanobots with ceramic and silicate repair templates.

craft_armor_plate.name: Forge Armor Plate
craft_armor_plate.description: Layer titanium and tungsten into high-strength armor plating.

craft_sensor_array_nebula.name: Grow Nebula Sensor Crystal
craft_sensor_array_nebula.description: Crystallize nebula essence into a resonant sensor matrix that detects faint energy signatures.

craft_pressure_seal.name: Mold Pressure Seal
craft_pressure_seal.description: Form polymer gaskets rated for vacuum-to-atmosphere pressure differentials.

salvage_to_power_cell.name: Rebuild Power Cells
salvage_to_power_cell.description: Reconstruct power cells from salvaged rare materials. Requires careful handling of exotic conductors.

salvage_to_circuits.name: Reclaim Circuit Boards
salvage_to_circuits.description: Painstaking extraction of intact circuits from salvage. The rare materials contain trace elements essential for microprocessor fabrication.

salvage_to_heat_sink.name: Recover Heat Sinks
salvage_to_heat_sink.description: Extract thermal management components from salvaged electronics. These parts are usually the last thing to fail.

salvage_to_hull_plate.name: Reforge Hull Plating
salvage_to_hull_plate.description: Cut and reshape salvaged metal into hull plating sections. Recycled plating has character — some say it's lucky.

salvage_to_wiring.name: Strip Wiring from Components
salvage_to_wiring.description: Carefully extract reusable wiring harnesses from salvaged ship components.

craft_missile_heavy.name: Assemble Armor-Buster Missiles
craft_missile_heavy.description: Shaped charge warheads designed to penetrate heavy armor.

craft_missiles_cluster.name: Assemble Cluster Missiles
craft_missiles_cluster.description: Splits into multiple submunitions before impact.

craft_mines_emp.name: Assemble EMP Mines
craft_mines_emp.description: Electromagnetic pulse mines that disrupt ships entering the blast zone.

craft_missiles_emp.name: Assemble EMP Missiles
craft_missiles_emp.description: Electromagnetic pulse warheads that disrupt all systems in blast radius.

craft_torpedoes_emp.name: Assemble EMP Torpedoes
craft_torpedoes_emp.description: Massive electromagnetic pulse that cripples all ship systems.

craft_mines_fragmentation.name: Assemble Fragmentation Mines
craft_mines_fragmentation.description: Wider blast radius with shrapnel dispersal.

craft_missiles_incendiary.name: Assemble Incendiary Missiles
craft_missiles_incendiary.description: Thermite warheads that burn through hull after detonation.

craft_mines_nuclear.name: Assemble Nuclear Mines
craft_mines_nuclear.description: Tactical nuclear devices. Enormous blast radius.

craft_mines_plasma.name: Assemble Plasma Mines
craft_mines_plasma.description: Thermal detonation mines with superheated blast.

craft_torpedoes_plasma.name: Assemble Plasma Torpedoes
craft_torpedoes_plasma.description: Superheated plasma warhead that melts armor on impact.

craft_torpedoes_siege.name: Assemble Siege Torpedoes
craft_torpedoes_siege.description: Maximum hull damage payload for breaking stations and capital ships.

craft_missile_standard.name: Assemble Standard Missiles
craft_missile_standard.description: Heat-seeking guided missiles. Reliable all-purpose ordnance.

craft_torpedoes_standard.name: Assemble Standard Torpedoes
craft_torpedoes_standard.description: Heavy anti-capital torpedoes. Slow but devastating.

craft_missiles_swarm.name: Assemble Swarm Missiles
craft_missiles_swarm.description: Pods of micro-missiles that saturate the target area.

craft_anomaly_detector.name: Build Anomaly Detector
craft_anomaly_detector.description: Specialized probe for finding hidden sites.

craft_combat_scanner.name: Build Combat Scanner Probe
craft_combat_scanner.description: Probe that reveals ship loadouts and status.

craft_decoy_drone.name: Build Decoy Drone
craft_decoy_drone.description: Deployable drone that mimics your ship signature.

craft_emergency_warp.name: Build Emergency Warp Device
craft_emergency_warp.description: One-time emergency jump to random nearby system.

craft_sensor_booster.name: Build Sensor Booster
craft_sensor_booster.description: Neon-tube signal amplifier that temporarily enhances scanner sensitivity.

craft_sensor_jammer.name: Build Sensor Jammer
craft_sensor_jammer.description: Deployable device that disrupts enemy sensors.

salvage_fuel_cells.name: Drain Fuel Reserves
salvage_fuel_cells.description: Extract residual fuel from salvaged power systems and components. Not the cleanest fuel, but it burns.

craft_overclock_chip.name: Fabricate Overclock Chip
craft_overclock_chip.description: Fluorine-etched microprocessor designed to temporarily overclock ship computing systems.

salvage_hull_patch.name: Field Hull Patch
salvage_hull_patch.description: Weld salvage metal directly over hull breaches. Ugly but effective — a salvager's specialty.

craft_armor_piercing_ammo.name: Manufacture AP Rounds
craft_armor_piercing_ammo.description: Hardened penetrator rounds that bypass armor plating.

craft_slugs_emp.name: Manufacture EMP Slugs
craft_slugs_emp.description: Slugs with embedded EMP burst coils.

craft_railgun_slugs.name: Manufacture Ferrous Slugs
craft_railgun_slugs.description: Dense iron slug cases for railgun systems.

craft_plasma_focused.name: Manufacture Focused Plasma Cells
craft_plasma_focused.description: Tight-beam plasma cells with concentrated energy.

craft_rounds_fragmenting.name: Manufacture Frag Rounds
craft_rounds_fragmenting.description: Pre-scored rounds that shatter into shrapnel on impact.

craft_rounds_incendiary.name: Manufacture Incendiary Rounds
craft_rounds_incendiary.description: Phosphorus-tipped rounds for sustained thermal damage.

craft_em_ion.name: Manufacture Ion Charges
craft_em_ion.description: Heavy ion charges for capacitor drain.

craft_plasma_cartridge.name: Manufacture Plasma Cells
craft_plasma_cartridge.description: Standard plasma cell packs for plasma weapons.

craft_standard_ammo.name: Manufacture Standard Rounds
craft_standard_ammo.description: Box of basic autocannon ammunition. Cheap and reliable.

autoprocess_munitions.name: Onboard Munitions Fabrication
autoprocess_munitions.description: The ship's integrated forge converts raw iron ore directly into standard ammunition.

salvage_repair_nanites.name: Reprogrammed Repair Nanites
salvage_repair_nanites.description: Nanites recovered from wreck systems, reprogrammed for hull repair. They remember their old ship — sometimes they get creative with the patches.

salvage_repair_kit.name: Salvager's Repair Kit
salvage_repair_kit.description: Repair kits assembled from salvaged components. Every part has a story, and most of those stories involve explosions.

craft_afterburner_fuel.name: Synthesize Afterburner Fuel
